entries.title: Mistral AI Drops New Open-Source Model. The Internet Is Not Impressed, Except for One Thing
entries.summary: Mistral Medium 3.5 is the rare Western entry in the open-source top tier, but it costs multiples more than Chinese rivals that beat it on benchmarks.

entries.title: Elon Musk Says xAI Used OpenAI Models to Train Grok
entries.summary: The admission in federal court is a rare acknowledgment of the use of distillation techniques as AI firms compete to build more capable and cheaper models.

entries.title: Bitcoin Crash Incoming? April Surge Was Built on Shaky Ground, Analysts Warn
entries.summary: Analysts warn that the Bitcoin rally was fueled by speculative futures trading, mirroring conditions that preceded the 2022 crypto crash.

entries.title: OpenAI Rolls Out Advanced Account Security for ChatGPT Users
entries.summary: OpenAI's new opt-in security feature requires passkeys, limits recovery options, and excludes chats from training.

entries.title: Ubuntu Linux Is Adding AI Features—Its Users Are Worried
entries.summary: Canonical announced plans to bake AI into Linux's most popular distro. The community that chose Ubuntu specifically to avoid this kind of thing was not thrilled.

entries.title: Senate Votes to Ban Senators and Staff From Using Prediction Markets
entries.summary: S. Res. 708 prohibits senators and staff from using prediction markets, and became effective immediately upon passage.

entries.title: North Korean Hackers Have Stolen $6 Billion in Crypto—Including 76% of 2026's Spoils: TRM
entries.summary: Pyongyang-linked hackers drained $577 million from two DeFi platforms in April, underscoring an escalating threat to crypto markets.

entries.title: OpenAI Finally Explains Why ChatGPT Wouldn't Stop Talking About Goblins
entries.summary: Why did OpenAI have to write "never mention goblins" into its production code on ChatGPT? The company has published a post-mortem.

entries.title: Agentic Memory: Walrus Takes On AI's Next Big Bottleneck
entries.summary: Long-term memory limits what AI agents can do. Walrus is going after it with MemWal plus new OpenClaw and NemoClaw integrations.

entries.title: Crypto Is the Most Muted Topic on Elon Musk’s X, Ahead of Politics: Product Head
entries.summary: Internal data shows users mute crypto more than politics and global conflict on X’s For You feed.

entries.title: Polymarket Launches Market Integrity Tools Following Soldier’s Insider Trading Arrest
entries.summary: The team-up between Polymarket and Chainalysis aims to bring institutional-grade compliance monitoring to crypto prediction markets.

entries.title: MegaETH Token Launches as Ethereum Layer-2 Network's Novel Rewards System Is Tested
entries.summary: Ethereum layer-2 network MegaETH will unlock its native MEGA token over time, and reward it to users, as key benchmarks are met.

entries.title: Twenty-One Weighs Mergers With Strike, Elektron to Create Publicly Traded Bitcoin Giant
entries.summary: Tether Investments proposed a three-way merger to create a Bitcoin platform combining mining, treasury management, and financial services

entries.title: Gemini Gains Key CFTC Approval to Expand Prediction Market, Perps Offerings
entries.summary: A DCO license will now allow crypto exchange Gemini to act as a clearinghouse for its derivatives-related businesses.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Falls After Powell's Likely Final FOMC
entries.summary: No rate cuts are coming any time soon, Big Tech earnings gave AI bulls more to work with, and Meta is back in crypto payments with USDC creator payouts.

entries.title: Google and Microsoft Just Proved the AI Trade Is Alive—While OpenAI Is Sweating
entries.summary: Alphabet and Microsoft crushed Q1 estimates on the same day, with Google Cloud up 63% and Microsoft's AI business hitting a $37 billion run rate.

entries.title: Labor Department Launches AI Apprenticeship Portal as Trump Admin Continues AI Policy Push
entries.summary: The Labor Department unveils an online hub to help workers and employers build AI skills amid a quickly changing jobs market.

entries.title: Mayo Clinic Says AI Can Detect Pancreatic Cancer Years Before Human Doctors
entries.summary: The AI model analyzes subtle tissue changes on routine CT scans invisible to human specialists, detecting pancreatic cancer up to three years earlier than doctors can.

entries.title: Key Senator Pushes for Vote on Clarity Act—But Hurdles Remain
entries.summary: Thom Tillis, a swing GOP vote on the Senate Banking Committee, says his colleagues should take up a months-delayed vote on the crypto bill.

entries.title: Meta Launches USDC Stablecoin Creator Payouts on Solana and Polygon via Stripe
entries.summary: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta is now offering stablecoin payouts to content creators in certain countries.

entries.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Banned From Crypto Industry in $10 Million FTC Settlement
entries.summary: The settlement represents a massive reduction from an initial $4.7 billion judgment against the Celsius founder.

entries.title: This AI Was Trained Only on Pre-1930 Text. We Asked It About Hitler, Stocks, and the Future
entries.summary: Talkie-1930 is a 13-billion-parameter model that has never heard of the internet, World War II, or modern politics. The results are fascinating, funny, and occasionally unsettling.

entries.title: White House Weighs Reinstating Anthropic for Federal Use Amid Pentagon Fight: Report
entries.summary: Trump officials reportedly drafted guidance to help agencies access Anthropic’s AI, including Claude Mythos, despite Pentagon restrictions.

entries.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Dip as Fed Holds Rates Steady for Third Straight Time
entries.summary: Wednesday's FOMC meeting was expected to be Jerome Powell’s last as Federal Reserve chair.

entries.title: Tether Stakeholder Gave Farage Undisclosed $6.7M Gift Amid Reform UK Crypto Funding Scrutiny
entries.summary: The personal gift to the Reform UK leader from billionaire Christopher Harborne comes amid scrutiny over crypto industry political funding.

entries.title: OpenAI Sued Over Failure to Warn Police Before Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting
entries.summary: A California lawsuit could test whether AI companies have a legal duty to report violent threats after a mass shooting in British Columbia.

entries.title: Canadian Government Pushes for Sweeping Ban on Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
entries.summary: The country hosts nearly 4,000 crypto ATMs, second only to the U.S.

entries.title: MoonPay Launches Institutional Division, Acquires Crypto Key Management Firm Sodot
entries.summary: Crypto payments processor MoonPay is expanding into institutional services with a veteran regulator at the helm.

entries.title: Polymarket Eyes US Return for Crypto Exchange as Lone CFTC Chair Weighs Approval​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
entries.summary: With four of five CFTC commissioner seats vacant, the decision on whether to lift Polymarket's U.S. ban rests with Chair Michael Selig alone.

entries.title: Visa Adds Base, Polygon, Canton, Arc and Tempo to Stablecoin Settlement Program
entries.summary: Payments giant Visa scales its blockchain settlement infrastructure with five new networks as pilot program shows 50% quarterly growth.

entries.title: Computershare Taps Securitize to Tokenize Thousands of Company Stocks on Wall Street
entries.summary: The BlackRock-backed firm was recently selected as by the New York Stock Exchange as a tokenization specialist.

entries.title: Bitcoin's Upside Capped by $82K Sell Wall as UAE’s OPEC Exit Triggers Risk Sell-Off
entries.summary: Multiple $3.3 million sell walls sit between $80,400 and $82,000 as oil volatility and rising real rates keep Bitcoin trapped.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Paul Tudor Jones Calls Bitcoin Strongest Inflation Hedge
entries.summary: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

entries.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
entries.summary: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

entries.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
entries.summary: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

entries.title: Crypto Markets Catch a Breath After Three-Day Slide
entries.summary: Bitcoin reclaims $76,000 despite U.S. spot ETFs posting a third consecutive day of outflows.

entries.title: MegaETH Token Debuts at $2 Billion Valuation
entries.summary: MEGA is live on Binance, Coinbase, and 11 other venues a week after the Ethereum Layer 2 network cleared its first performance milestone.

entries.title: Anchorage Digital Partners with M0 on US Stablecoin Issuance Stack
entries.summary: The partnership aims to make it easier for companies, including fintechs and paying firms, to issue compliant stablecoins in the United States.

entries.title: Polymarket Taps Chainalysis to Police Insider Trading
entries.summary: The prediction market will deploy a custom on-chain detection model to flag insider activity.

entries.title: Coinbase's Institutional Investment Arm Taps Superstate to Launch Tokenized Credit Fund
entries.summary: Coinbase Asset Management has selected Superstate FundOS to issue on-chain shares of Coinbase Stablecoin Yield Fund (CUSHY).

entries.title: PayPal Elevates Crypto to Core Business in Strategic Reorganization
entries.summary: The payments giant will fold PYUSD, Braintree, and merchant processing into a new Payment Services & Crypto division, marking the first time digital assets have a dedicated home within the company.

entries.title: Circle Launches Gas-Free 'Nanopayments' on Mainnet Across 11 Blockchains
entries.summary: The stablecoin issuer's new payment rail enables USDC transfers as small as $0.000001, targeting AI agents that pay per API call, per second, or per dataset read.

entries.title: Wasabi Loses $5M+ in Latest DeFi Exploit
entries.summary: Wasabi Protocol is the latest victim in what appears to be a record bad month for DeFi hacks.

entries.title: Kraken Launches Crypto and Tokenized Stocks Bundles
entries.summary: Kraken is introducing curated portfolio bundles combining cryptocurrency with traditional U.S. equities and ETFs through its xStocks offering.

entries.title: Maple Finance's SYRUP Token Now Available on Revolut in UK and EU
entries.summary: Maple Finance's SYRUP token launched on Revolut, giving the fintech's 70M+ users across 39 countries access to on-chain institutional credit yield.

entries.title: Bitcoin Dips Under $76K as Fed Holds Rates in Rare 8-4 Split
entries.summary: ETH is down 7% on the week as the Fed signals the bar for rate cuts has risen, and ETF outflows top $350 million over two days.

entries.title: Meta Launches Stablecoin Payouts In Colombia And The Philippines
entries.summary: The social media giant has rolled out USDC payments via Stripe on Solana and Polygon.

entries.title: Polymarket Hit $25.7B in March Volume as Retail Traders Bet on Sports, Politics and Crypto
entries.summary: A study of 1.29M wallets shows users returning more often and trading across more categories, with sports leading at $10.1B and crypto serving as the main onboarding gateway.

entries.title: MoonPay Folds Sodot Into New Institutional Platform
entries.summary: Former acting CFTC Chairman Caroline Pham will run the new business, which bundles key management, custody, execution, and white-label stablecoin issuance into a single stack.

entries.title: US Judge Bans Celsius Founder Mashinsky From Any Product Involving 'Assets'
entries.summary: The Federal Trade Commission settlement decision also ordered Mashinsky to pay the commission $10 million.

entries.title: Stable Sea Taps WisdomTree to Bring Tokenized Treasury Yield to Business Operating Cash
entries.summary: The collaboration lets non-crypto-native finance teams sweep idle dollars into WisdomTree's WTGXX alongside their stablecoin payments, with daily dividend accrual and 24/7 liquidity.

entries.title: Securitize Teams Up With Computershare to Tokenize U.S.-Listed Equities
entries.summary: Issuer-Sponsored Tokens enable direct equity ownership in token form, rather than synthetic wrappers sitting on top of underlying shares.

entries.title: Pumpfun Announces 50% Revenue Buyback-and-Burn Model
entries.summary: PUMP briefly rallied today on news that the platform has burned ~36% of the token's circulating supply from previous buybacks.

entries.title: Standard Chartered Calls Kelp Aftermath DeFi's 'Antifragile Moment'
entries.summary: The bank's digital assets team argues the post-Kelp coalition response and structural fixes around bridges leave DeFi stronger, not weaker, ahead of the Ethereum Economic Zone going live this summer.

entries.title: Bullish Invests 250 BTC in BTCFi Company Mezo
entries.summary: The investment, worth over $19M at current prices, coincides with Mezo's launch of Bitcoin yield vaults for institutional clients.

entries.title: Bitcoin Holds $76K Ahead of Powell's Final Fed Meeting
entries.summary: Crypto markets are trading cautiously, with the Fed widely expected to hold rates steady tomorrow.

entries.title: DeFi United Outlines Technical Path To Make Kelp's rsETH Whole
entries.summary: The coalition has secured ETH commitments to refill the bridge in tranches and will use Aave and Compound governance proposals to liquidate the exploiter's remaining positions.

entries.title: Developers of Telegram's Crypto Wallet Launch Agentic Wallets
entries.summary: The open-source standard, developed by The Open Platform, lets AI agents manage dedicated on-chain wallets without requiring user sign-off on every transaction

entries.title: Ostium Launches Institutional Hedging Layer
entries.summary: The Arbitrum-based RWA perps protocol now routes net directional flow to Jump and prime brokers offchain, retiring the single-pool model that absorbed all trader risk.

entries.title: CFTC Sues Wisconsin in Response to State's Lawsuits Against Prediction Markets
entries.summary: The CFTC filed suit against Wisconsin to establish its exclusive regulatory authority over prediction markets, a sector closely tied to crypto and blockchain-based derivatives.

entries.title: Polymarket Seeks Full CFTC Approval for Its Main Platform: Report
entries.summary: The move would let Polymarket's primary, on-chain prediction market platform operate in the United States, rather than through its current intermediated setup with Polymarket US.

entries.title: Ondo Partners with Broadridge to Bring Shareholder Voting to Tokenized Stocks
entries.summary: The partnership lets holders of tokenized equity and ETFs participate in proxy voting and access other governance features.
